Class SignUp

java.lang.Object
com.example.passmanager.AccountInstance
com.example.passmanager.SignUp
public class SignUp extends AccountInstance
Represents the primary user account created during sign-up Extends AccountInstance with personal details (first name, last name, date of birth) and the salt used to derive the user's AES key. The platform for this account is always MM PassManager and the ID is always 1

  • Constructor Details

    • SignUp

      public SignUp(String password, String platform, String username, String fname, String lname, LocalDate dateOfBirth, String salt)
      Constructs a new SignUp account with full user profile information.
      Parameters:
      password - the encrypted password for this account
      platform - the platform name MM PassManager
      username - the username
      fname - the user's first name
      lname - the user's last name
      dateOfBirth - the user's date of birth
      salt - the encoded salt

  • Method Details

    • getFname

      public String getFname()
      Returns the user's first name.
      Returns:
      the first name

    • setFname

      public void setFname(String fname)
      Sets the user's first name if the string is not empty.
      Parameters:
      fname - the new first name; ignored if blank

    • getLname

      public String getLname()
      Returns the user's last name.
      Returns:
      the last name

    • setLname

      public void setLname(String lname)
      Sets the user's last name if the string is not empty.
      Parameters:
      lname - the new last name; ignored if blank

    • getDateOfBirth

      public LocalDate getDateOfBirth()
      Returns the user's date of birth.
      Returns:
      the date of birth as a LocalDate object

    • setDateOfBirth

      public void setDateOfBirth(LocalDate dateOfBirth)
      Sets the user's date of birth.
      Parameters:
      dateOfBirth - the new date of birth
